title: lepidagathis microphylla
intro: Lepidagathis microphylla, also known as the small lepidagathis, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lepidagathis microphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
